jobs.name: fruits
jobs.summary: Identify and classify fruits from a mixed list of items

workflows.name: full
workflows.summary: Run the complete fruits identification and classification
workflows.how_to_invoke: Call `deepwork_start_workflow` with job_name="fruits" and workflow_name="full", then follow the step instructions it returns.
